breakout_acceptance.message: Price above value area, holding above anchored VWAP with participation.

bullish_acceptance.message: Price accepted above value area and above anchored VWAP.

failed_upside_auction.message: Price pushed above VAH but fell back inside value. Upside rejected.

bearish_acceptance.message: Price accepted below value area and below anchored VWAP.

failed_downside_auction.message: Price pushed below VAL but reclaimed value. Downside rejected.

stretched_stable.message: Pair stretched while relationship remains stable.

extreme_stable.message: Pair at extreme stretch with stable relationship. Mean reversion candidate.

relationship_broken.message: Pair correlation has broken. Do not assume mean reversion.

quality_positive_drift.message: Quality earnings drift candidate: positive surprise, auction acceptance, quality support.

failed_positive_beat.message: Positive beat failed to hold. Market rejecting the earnings surprise.

negative_drift.message: Negative earnings drift: miss plus bearish auction rejection.

overreaction_watch.message: Large surprise with extended distance from earnings AVWAP. Possible overreaction.

monitor.message: Crowding elevated. Monitor before adding exposure.

high.message: High crowding. Entry requires stronger confirmation.

exit_door_risk.message: Exit-door risk. Avoid or size very small.
